issue.title: [bug]: --presets map to radix
issue.body:
### Describe the bug

when attempting to change preset using the skill in Claude Code, it attempts to change from base-ui to radix because the preset maps to radix (i was using base-ui)

```
Claude: This is a significant change since it switches from Base UI to Radix primitives. Let me now update the config, CSS, and smart-merge each component.

Me: --preset aJMi5Dc is supposed to be base-vega not radix
```
my response is i guess false, since it shouldn't map to either?

```
Claude: The CLI resolved preset aJMi5Dc to radix-vega, not base-vega. The preset code determines the exact style — it seems this code maps to radix-vega in the shadcn registry.
```

### Affected component/components

CLI, presets, skills

### How to reproduce

create a project using base-ui as Base (i used a monorepo), ask agent to change to a different preset

### Codesandbox/StackBlitz link

_No response_

### Logs

```bash
⏺ The preset aJMi5Dc changes several things:
  - Style: base-nova → radix-vega
  - Base: base → radix (different primitive library)
  - Icon library: lucide → phosphor
  - Font: Geist → Public Sans
  - Base color: neutral → zinc
  - New color scheme: teal/cyan primary colors

  This is a significant change since it switches from Base UI to Radix primitives. Let me now update the config, CSS, and smart-merge each component.

⏺ Read(packages/ui/src/styles/globals.css)
  ⎿  Read 129 lines

⏺ Read(/tmp/shadcn-preset-test/test-app/src/components/ui/button.tsx)
  ⎿  Read 68 lines

⏺ Read(/tmp/shadcn-preset-test/test-app/src/lib/utils.ts)
  ⎿  Read 7 lines

                                                                                                                                                       04:45 PM claude-opus-4-6
⏺ Now let me get the upstream versions of all 6 installed components for the new radix-vega style, so I can smart-merge them.

⏺ Bash(cd /tmp/shadcn-preset-test/test-app && pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add card field input label separator --yes 2>&1)
  ⎿  Interrupted · What should Claude do instead?

❯  --preset aJMi5Dc is supposed to be base-vega not radix

                                                                                                                                                       04:47 PM claude-opus-4-6
⏺ Let me re-create the temp project with the correct interpretation. The preset should use base (Base UI) not radix.

⏺ Bash(rm -rf /tmp/shadcn-preset-test && mkdir -p /tmp/shadcn-preset-test && cd /tmp/shadcn-preset-test && pnpm dlx shadcn@latest init --preset aJMi5Dc --template vite --name test-app
       --yes 2>&1 | tail -20)
  ⎿  Error: Permission to use Bash with command rm -rf /tmp/shadcn-preset-test && mkdir -p /tmp/shadcn-preset-test && cd /tmp/shadcn-preset-test && pnpm dlx shadcn@latest init
     --preset aJMi5Dc --template vite --name test-app --yes 2>&1 has been denied.

⏺ Bash(cd /tmp/shadcn-preset-test/test-app && cat components.json)
  ⎿  {
       "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema.json",
       "style": "radix-vega",
       "rsc": false,
       "tsx": true,
       "tailwind": {
         "config": "",
         "css": "src/index.css",
         "baseColor": "zinc",
         "cssVariables": true,
         "prefix": ""
       },
       "iconLibrary": "phosphor",
       "rtl": false,
       "aliases": {
         "components": "@/components",
         "utils": "@/lib/utils",
         "ui": "@/components/ui",
         "lib": "@/lib",
         "hooks": "@/hooks"
       },
       "menuColor": "default",
       "menuAccent": "subtle",
       "registries": {}
     }
  ⎿  Shell cwd was reset to /Users/davidsoards/Projects/soardscn-cli4

                                                                                                                                                       04:47 PM claude-opus-4-6
⏺ The CLI resolved preset aJMi5Dc to radix-vega, not base-vega. The preset code determines the exact style — it seems this code maps to radix-vega in the shadcn registry.

  Are you sure the code aJMi5Dc is correct? If you want base-vega specifically, you may need a different preset code, or we could manually set the style to base-vega instead of using
  the preset code. What would you prefer?
```

### System Info

```bash
Mac OS 15.7.4
```

### Before submitting

- [x] I've made research efforts and searched the documentation
- [x] I've searched for existing issues

fixDiff:
diff --git a/skills/shadcn/SKILL.md b/skills/shadcn/SKILL.md
index 022142ad532..8a76cc0dc27 100644
--- a/skills/shadcn/SKILL.md
+++ b/skills/shadcn/SKILL.md
@@ -176,6 +176,7 @@ npx shadcn@latest docs button dialog select
    - **Reinstall**: `npx shadcn@latest init --preset <code> --force --reinstall`. Overwrites all components.
    - **Merge**: `npx shadcn@latest init --preset <code> --force --no-reinstall`, then run `npx shadcn@latest info` to list installed components, then for each installed component use `--dry-run` and `--diff` to [smart merge](#updating-components) it individually.
    - **Skip**: `npx shadcn@latest init --preset <code> --force --no-reinstall`. Only updates config and CSS, leaves components as-is.
+   - **Important**: Always run preset commands inside the user's project directory. The CLI automatically preserves the current base (`base` vs `radix`) from `components.json`. If you must use a scratch/temp directory (e.g. for `--dry-run` comparisons), pass `--base <current-base>` explicitly — preset codes do not encode the base.
 
 ## Updating Components
 
diff --git a/skills/shadcn/cli.md b/skills/shadcn/cli.md
index 32124036dd2..bdbfe401cba 100644
--- a/skills/shadcn/cli.md
+++ b/skills/shadcn/cli.md
@@ -253,3 +253,5 @@ Ask the user first: **reinstall**, **merge**, or **skip** existing components?
 - **Re-install** → `npx shadcn@latest init --preset <code> --force --reinstall`. Overwrites all component files with the new preset styles. Use when the user hasn't customized components.
 - **Merge** → `npx shadcn@latest init --preset <code> --force --no-reinstall`, then run `npx shadcn@latest info` to get the list of installed components and use the [smart merge workflow](./SKILL.md#updating-components) to update them one by one, preserving local changes. Use when the user has customized components.
 - **Skip** → `npx shadcn@latest init --preset <code> --force --no-reinstall`. Only updates config and CSS variables, leaves existing components as-is.
+
+Always run preset commands inside the user's project directory. The CLI automatically preserves the current base (`base` vs `radix`) from `components.json`. If you must use a scratch/temp directory (e.g. for `--dry-run` comparisons), pass `--base <current-base>` explicitly — preset codes do not encode the base.
